text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I happen to bump into<n>Matikanetannhauser while
she's<n>mid-training and stop to talk with her<n>
when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Awww! Look at that super cute<n>stroller over
there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It even has Umamusume ears<n>attached to it! And
one of them has a<n>pink ribbon. How sweet!
choice_data_list: I wonder if it's a baby Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That must be the baby's mom and<n>dad next to
the stroller.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But the mom doesn't have<n>Umamusume ears.
Maybe they're<n>just racing fans.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! As if! Who would be a fan of<n>someone
as average as m—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wha... Oh no!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It all happens in less than a second.<n>The father's
backpack bumps against<n>the stroller, and it starts
to roll down<n>the riverbank quickly.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Dash, dash, dash! Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Phew! Just in the nick of time...

text_block_list.name: Mother
text_block_list.text: Oh my goodness!

text_block_list.name: Father
text_block_list.text: Are you all right?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine! I'm more worried about<n>your baby!
Wait, where is she?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Safe in her mother's arms... I<n>didn't even
realize...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Man, I can't believe I just dove after<n>an empty
stroller. That was<n>embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but it was all for nothing. The<n>parents kept
apologizing and thanking<n>me too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm really glad the cute stroller was<n>fine, but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Jeez... When am I finally gonna get a<n>break? I
just wanna look really cool<n>for once...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser may feel<n>dissatisfied, but
the parents seem<n>genuinely grateful.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Of course I didn't!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I thought the baby was going to hurtle<n>down the
riverbank if I didn't do<n>something.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Sigh. But, well... Hehe. Guess Igoofed.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser tries to hide her<n>
embarrassment by laughing, but I<n>think she did a
really noble thing<n>today.
